---
title: "Temporary PMM 110 Comparison"
date: '`r Sys.Date()`'
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    self-contained: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
source(here::here("R", "001-libraries.R"))
source(here::here("R", "002-folder_paths.R"))
```

{{< include PMM_110_Comparison_of_Consensus_Langa_Weir.qmd >}}
